---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that isn't working correctly
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: kotewar
---

## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## Screenshots / logs
If applicable, add screenshots or log output to help explain the problem.

## Environment
- Browser / OS: [e.g. Chrome on macOS]
- Repository branch: [e.g. main]

## Additional context
Add any other context about the problem here.

> 💡 **Tip:** Try asking Copilot Chat to help investigate — open the file in question and use `/explain` or describe the bug in chat.
